name: Low-Fat Persimmon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the unbleached flour, whole wheat flour, salt, cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
2. In another bowl, mix 3/4 cup sugar with persimmon pulp until well combined.
3. Add baking soda to the sugar-persimmon mixture and beat in egg whites until just blended.
4. Stir in applesauce, currants, and chopped almonds (if using) into the flour mixture.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a cookie sheet sprayed with a nonstick cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
